entities.name: MYCOTOXINS
entities.description: Toxic compounds produced by fungi that contaminate agricultural crops

entities.name: AFLATOXINS
entities.description: A specific type of mycotoxin found in maize, peanut, sorghum, and cassava

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A cereal grain affected by aflatoxins and Fusarium toxins

entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: An oilseed crop affected by aflatoxins

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal grain affected by aflatoxins and Fusarium toxins

entities.name: CASSAVA
entities.description: A root crop affected by aflatoxins

entities.name: FUSARIUM TOXINS
entities.description: Mycotoxins produced by Fusarium fungi, affecting maize, wheat, and sorghum

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A cereal grain affected by Fusarium toxins

entities.name: OCHRATOXIN
entities.description: A mycotoxin found in cocoa and cashew

entities.name: COCOA
entities.description: A crop affected by ochratoxin

entities.name: CASHEW
entities.description: A crop affected by ochratoxin

entities.name: GENETIC ENHANCEMENT
entities.description: The process of improving plant genetics to fight mycotoxins

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: A method of genetic enhancement used to develop resistant crops

entities.name: BIOTECHNOLOGY
entities.description: A method of genetic enhancement using biological systems

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL CONTROL
entities.description: The use of living organisms to control mycotoxin-producing fungi

entities.name: HABITAT MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Managing the environment to reduce mycotoxin contamination

entities.name: RISK ASSESSMENT
entities.description: The process of evaluating the risks associated with mycotoxin exposure

entities.name: INSTITUTIONAL CAPACITY BUILDING
entities.description: Strengthening organizational abilities to manage mycotoxin issues

entities.name: PUBLIC AWARENESS
entities.description: Educating the public to fight and prevent mycotoxin contamination

entities.name: INTEGRATED CROP MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A holistic approach combining various tools to manage mycotoxins

entities.name: MYCOTOXIN-RESISTANT GERMPLASM
entities.description: Plant material that exhibits resistance to mycotoxin contamination

entities.name: HABITAT CONTROL
entities.description: A component of integrated crop management to control the environment

entities.name: SOIL-AMENDMENTS
entities.description: Adding materials to soil to reduce mycotoxin levels

entities.name: MYCOTOXIN DETECTION TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Tools used for the rapid appraisal and detection of mycotoxin levels

entities.name: PARTICIPATORY PROCESS
entities.description: A collaborative approach for mycotoxin assessment in commercially important crops

entities.name: CGIAR
entities.description: The Consultative Group on International Agricultural Research, coordinating the research-for-development program
